description_long: This is a black Hohner accordion with a robust, angular body and a prominent bellows section at its center. The left side features multiple rows of white buttons arranged in a grid, while the right side displays a similar button array, both set into glossy black panels. The bellows are ribbed and flexible, allowing for expansion and contraction, and are flanked by hard, boxy end pieces. The front panel is adorned with a metallic grille and the 'HOHNER' brand name in bold letters. Metal hardware, including latches and a handle, are visible on the top and sides, suggesting portability. The overall finish is sleek and reflective, with a combination of hard plastic, metal, and fabric materials.
description: A black Hohner accordion with white button arrays, ribbed bellows, and a metallic grille, featuring a sleek, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the metallic grille, 'HOHNER' branding, and two rows of white buttons on the left panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left panel with three vertical rows of white buttons and visible hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the plain black back panel and the full width of the ribbed bellows.
description_view_3: Side view of the right panel, showing the button array and the metallic grille, with less detail on the bellows.
attribute_button_layout: 3 rows of 10 buttons on each side
